claim_boundaries: Synthetic introspection sidecar fixture; token-quality, scheduler packet-lineage, device DMA lifecycle, attention page trace, tensor payload logit-slice rows, generic tensor payload rows, tensor payload activation-digest rows, tensor payload K/V digest rows, and device result digest rows are system-under-test diagnostics, not model correctness or performance evidence.
Debug-heavy payload sidecars can perturb timing and require separate production-performance recapture.
Do not read absent counters as zero.
Do not infer device utilization from wall-clock spans alone.
Do not compare different trace modes, TargetPlans, prompts, token counts, hardware, or dirty/clean states without making that difference explicit.
